1. Environment Preparation

The backend is implemented using Python and FastAPI.
Ensure that Python (version 3.9 or later) is installed on your machine.


2. Installing Dependencies

Install the required Python packages using pip:
   pip install fastapi uvicorn
These packages are used to:
	•	Build REST APIs (FastAPI)
	•	Run the backend development server (Uvicorn)


3. Creating the First API Endpoint

first clone the project:
  git clone https://github.com/WedAbdullh/RASD_adaptive-api-deception.git
  cd RASD_adaptive-api-deception

after clone the project you can use  backend_api/hello.py file, to use in running the server


4. Running the Backend Server

From inside the backend_api directory, start the server using:
   uvicorn main:app --reload
used to start a FastAPI application using the Uvicorn server. It tells Uvicorn to run the FastAPI app object named app that is defined inside the Python file hello.py.

To test the /hello endpoint, open a browser and visit:
   http://127.0.0.1:8000/hello

Expected response: {"message": "Hello from RASD"}
